features: Two Step, Scalp First System - Shampoo refreshes at the root while conditioner hydrates from root to tip for a fuller looking finish.
Fuller Looking Volume - With consistent use, hair appears thicker, lifted, and more manageable without heaviness.
Lightweight Hydration - Conditions to enhance softness and natural looking shine while maintaining touchable body.
Thoughtful Ingredients - Features caffeine, biotin, amino acids, ginseng root, and turmeric to support the look and feel of healthy hair.
Daily Friendly & Color Safe - Sulfate and silicone free, safe for all hair types and color treated hair. Dermatologist tested.
